title: District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar Peon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
shortInfo: District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar has released the official Peon Notification 2026 on 28 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced under the Yamuna Nagar Peon Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 42 years with a qualification of Middle standard can apply offline from 28 May 2026 to 17 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

basic_details.job_title: District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar Peon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar has released the official Peon Notification 2026 on 28 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced under the Yamuna Nagar Peon Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 42 years with a qualification of Middle standard can apply offline from 28 May 2026 to 17 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: Scheduled Castes: 5 years Backward Classes: 5 years Disabled persons: 10 years (+5 years if PwD applicant belongs to S/Caste, S/Tribe, B/Classes, EWS Category) subject to maximum 52 years Ex-serviceman: extent of his military service added by three years Unmarried women: 5 years Wives of military personnel who are disabled: 5 years Widowed or legally divorced women: 5 years Judicially separated women: 5 years Persons who have already worked or presently working on adhoc/contract/work-charged/daily wages basis in any Department/ Board/ Corporation of Haryana Government: equal to the number of completed years only on equivalent post on adhoc/ contract/ work-charged/ daily wages basis excluding the period of break, if any, including any other age relaxation admissible, if any, subject to maximum age of 52 years

qualification.details: Middle standard examination from recognized Board Possess knowledge of Hindi/Punjabi

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay of Rs. 16,900/- per month, initially for a period of six months or till regular appointments are made, whichever is earlier.

selection_process: Selection will be made strictly in accordance with amended Rule 7 of the Haryana Subordinate Courts Establishment (Recruitment and General Conditions of Service) Rules
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar Peon Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://yamunanagar.dcourts.gov.in/notice-category/recruitments/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Peon post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Peon post is 17th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the Peon post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is the Middle standard examination from a recognized Board.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Peon post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Peon post is between 18 to 42 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Peon post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 16,900/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Peon post?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply offline by sending their application form to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Peon post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies available for the Peon post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for Scheduled Castes, Backward Classes, Disabled persons, and Ex-servicemen as per government rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Peon recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an interview, conducted strictly in accordance with the relevant rules.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates need to be attached.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar.
